title: Impact analysis
description: A project owner or AI tool asks what is affected if a document changes and gets the descendants and FBS slots that ripple from the edit.
iWant: to ask what is affected if I change a given document
soThat: I understand the ripple of an edit before I make it

acceptanceCriteria.description: Impact analysis on a requirement returns descendant documents and FBS slots whose acceptance criteria fall under it
acceptanceCriteria.then: it returns the descendant documents that depend on it and any FBS slots whose acceptance criteria fall under it

acceptanceCriteria.description: Impact analysis on an architecture document returns the FBS items that reference it as context
acceptanceCriteria.then: it returns the FBS items that reference it as context

acceptanceCriteria.description: Impact analysis on a document with no dependents reports an empty impact set
acceptanceCriteria.then: it reports an empty impact set
